data.title: Flowers Foods Non-GAAP EPS of $0.30 beats by $0.01, revenue of $1.24B misses by $30M

data.title: Precigen surges on FDA approval for gene therapy
data.description:
Shares of Precigen (NASDAQ:PGEN) added ~34% in the premarket on Friday after the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) approved its gene therapy candidate Papzimeos (zopapogene imadenovec-drba) for a tumor condition called recurrent respiratory papillomatosis (RRP).

According to the FDA, the adenoviral vector-based immunotherapy will be available for adults with RRP, a rare chronic disease characterized by benign tumors in the respiratory tract, often in the larynx.

Early this year, the agency accepted Precigen’s (NASDAQ:PGEN) biologics license application for the treatment, granting priority review with a target action date of Aug. 25.

The BLA was supported by data from a pivotal Phase 1/2 clinical study, which achieved its primary objectives, as more than 50% of patients reported complete remissions with no need for RRP surgeries within 12 months after receiving Papzimeos.

“Randomized trials are not always needed to approve medical products, and this approval is proof of that philosophy,” said Vinay Prasad, who recently returned to the FDA to lead the agency’s Center for Biologics Evaluation and Research (CBER).

“The FDA will always demand the correct clinical study for the specific medical product and disease.”

data.title: Daily Journal GAAP EPS of $50.81, revenue of $59.29M

data.title: GIBO to execute 200-for-1 share consolidation
data.description:
• GIBO Holdings (NASDAQ:GIBO) will implement a 200-for-1 share consolidation of its issued and unissued Class A ordinary shares and Class B ordinary shares, effective August 20, 2025.
  • The move aims to boost the market price per share of the company's Class A ordinary shares.
  • GIBO -13.7% premarket.

data.title: BrilliA's controlling shareholder selling entire stake of 14.2M Class A shares
data.description:
BrilliA (NYSE:BRIA) has issued a prospectus for a stock sale where its controlling shareholder, Salim Podiono, is selling all 14.2 million of his Class A shares.

BrilliA has a unique share structure: Class A shares grant one vote per share, while Class B shares grant 20 votes per share, but has no economic interest beyond a return of capital if the company closes.

data.title: Bolt Projects to raise $4.25M in private placement
data.description:
Bolt Projects Holdings (NASDAQ:BSLK) has entered into an agreement for a private placement of its common stock, to sell a total of 913,979 shares (or pre-funded warrants) at a price of $4.65 per share.

The gross proceeds from the offering are expected to be approximately $4.25 million.

The company intends to use the net proceeds from the offering for working capital and other general corporate purposes.

The transaction is expected to close around August 15, 2025.

data.title: Starz Entertainment GAAP EPS of -$2.54 misses by $2.50, revenue of $319.7M misses by $6.3M
data.description:
• Starz Entertainment Corp. press release (NASDAQ:STRZ): Q2 GAAP EPS of -$2.54 misses by $2.50.
  • Revenue of $319.7M (-8.0% Y/Y) misses by $6.3M.

  • Adjusted OIBDA was $33.4 Million.

  • Management Reiterates Outlook for Sequential Revenue and OTT Subscriber Growth in Q3 and Q4 of 2025.

data.title: Viomi sees over RMB1.4B in H1 revenue, up 70% from last year
data.description:
• Viomi (NASDAQ:VIOT) currently expects to report total revenue exceeding RMB1.4 billion, representing a year-over-year increase of more than 70% from the first half of 2024.
  • The anticipated increase is primarily driven by the rising sales for household water purification equipment, further supported by national subsidy policies.
